description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image and a selenium/standalone-chrome:latest service aliased as selenium. Set a cache keyed by ${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} that stores the deps/ and _build/ directories. Define a before_script that exports CONTAINER_IP by parsing /etc/hosts, runs mix local.rebar --force, mix local.hex --force, and mix deps.get. Add a mix job in the default test stage that executes echo $CONTAINER_IP and then runs mix test. No additional artifacts, rules, or deployment targets are required.
